calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yaasha Sabba, via Zoom, for Keith Moore, Personal Representative.

The court points to the remaining issue of the request to distribute a portion of Terrence Chilton's share of this estate to the Sacramento Department of Child Support Services (DCSS). Counsel is advised that the court is willing to treat the partial assignment of Terrence Chilton's interest in this estate, filed by the DCSS on Jun-30-2022, as a general assignment. Counsel agrees with the court's suggestion.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported. ?

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Jul-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Continued To Jun-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yaasha Sabba, via Zoom, for Keith Moore, Personal Representative; Mary Clemente, via Zoom, for Sacramento Department of Child Support Services ("DCCS"), Requestor.

The court and counsel discuss the issue of how to distribute a portion of Terrence Chilton's share to the DCCS to satisfy a lien that has not been filed, recorded, or noticed, as the court believes that it cannot order the preceding and relief should be sought via CA Civil Code of Procedure. Ms. Clemente and Mr. Sabba offer suggestions on how to resolve this issue and move forward. Mr. Sabba requests a continuance to work with Ms. Clemente, accordingly.

The Accounting Petition is continued to Jun-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is advised that if relief is sought via the CCP, it should be filed as a Petition and that the petition should be titled "Petition for Order that Judgement Debtor's Interest in Estate be Applied to Support Lien" with a Jun-14-2022 hearing date in the caption with a note in the caption stating that Judge Quinn has approved the calendaring of the petition for the date specified.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Continued To Apr-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yaasha Sabba, via ZOOM, for Keith Moore, Personal Representative.

The court advises counsel that the court cannot order distribution based on a lien that is not filed, recorded or properly noticed. Mr. Sabba reports that he has attempted to contact the Department of Child Support Services ("DCSS") to advise them of their imperfect claim but has not received a response and that he also notified DCSS last week regarding today's hearing. Mr. Sabba confirms speaking to "Paul" at DCSS two weeks ago regarding today's hearing and was advised that the DCSS would not be able to file a claim within two-weeks and asks the court to authorizing the distribution to DCSS without the lien. The court advises that it will be continuing this matter and instructs Mr. Sabba to make additional attempts to contact "Paul" at the DCSS to provide notice regarding the next calling of this matter and to file a declaration regarding his attempts to contact DCSS.

The Petition for Final Distribution, etc., is continued to Apr-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Continued To Mar-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
